title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Unisys India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Unisys India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Unisys India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Backend Developer to strengthen our Bengaluru-based team.

About Unisys India:
Unisys India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in TensorFlow

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Unisys India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
